residuals: The PDF is not tagged and therefore does not claim PDF/UA or screen-reader conformance.
The DOCX passed LibreOffice conversion and complete raster review but was not reviewed in Microsoft Word; no Microsoft Word quality claim is made.
The EPUB passed package, spine, navigation, and text checks but was not reviewed in a native reading application or with assistive technology.
The PDF repair removed one renderer-created page containing only the printed pagination token 708 and no XObjects or annotations; subsequent printed page numbers retain their original values.
non_claims: This reader release does not replace the canonical v2.3.0 living-book evidence release.
This release does not claim accessibility conformance, external review, peer review, or legal review.
Reader formatting does not promote any chapter-core claim or strengthen any empirical conclusion.
